center.name: 卡魯地區
center.summary: 卡魯地區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Karoo korhaan、仙玉鹟、Karoo prinia等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bird on average has a life span of 3.8 years. They also move with irregular flocks sometimes, traveling to non-breeding areas such as the northern Karoo. In the southern Cape, numbers increase during spring, while the species is largely absent from the drier northern parts of its range in summer

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (retrieved from http://www.hbw.com/node/53724 on 3 March 2017). The karoo korhaan lives in a range of arid habitats associated with the karoo and other arid scrubland habitats found in western South Africa and Namibia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a species found in karoo scrub, fynbos and bracken-covered slopes in semi-desert and mountains

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 1 m high vegetation and can be found in the low shrublands of the Karoo and Namaqualand in South Africa, in drainage line woodland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in South Africa, where it is present in Little Namaqualand, the Karoo and Northern Cape, Free State, Gauteng, Limpopo, Mpumalanga and parts of the North West Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in open habitats such as grassland, karoo scrub, thornbush and agricultural land, and often associates with farm animals

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Stenostira scita is a common seasonal migrant, breeding in karoo scrub and fynbos in the southern highlands, and migrating north in to spend the southern winter in thorn scrub at lower altitudes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cape clapper lark is a species of open grassland and savannah, also inhabiting karoo, fynbos and fallow agricultural land
